word: G1714 - ἐμπρήθω - emprḗthō - em-pray'-tho - Burn up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐμπρήθω

- Transliteration: Empretho

- Phonetic: em-pray'-tho

- Definition:

1. to burn

2. destroy by fire

- Origin: from G1722 and pretho (to blow a flame)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1722 and πρήθω prē thō (to blow a flame); to enkindle that is set on fire: - burn up.
